tasks.name: Security Patch
tasks.description: Apply urgent security patch for CVE-2024-XXXX

action.title: [P0][Security] Patch CVE-2024-XXXX
action.body:
## Overview
Urgent security patch for authentication bypass vulnerability.

## Priority
**P0 - Critical**

## CVE Details
- CVE ID: CVE-2024-XXXX
- Severity: High
- CVSS Score: 8.5

## Tasks
- [ ] Apply security patch
- [ ] Update dependencies
- [ ] Security audit

tasks.name: Refactoring Foundation
tasks.description: Set up foundation for refactoring work

action.title: [Refactor] Foundation Setup for Tech Debt
action.body:
## Overview
Set up foundation for technical debt reduction.

## Priority
**P2 - Normal**

## Scope
- Establish coding standards
- Set up linting rules
- Create refactoring guidelines

## Goals
- Improve maintainability
- Reduce technical debt
- Standardize patterns

tasks.name: Auth Module Fix
tasks.description: Fix authentication module based on security patch

action.title: [P0][Fix] Auth Module Security Hardening
action.body:
## Overview
Harden authentication module after security patch.

## Parent Issue
Depends on: #${$.security_patch.output.number}

## Priority
**P0 - Critical**

## Tasks
- [ ] Implement additional validation
- [ ] Add rate limiting
- [ ] Enhance session management
- [ ] Add security logging

action.title: [Test] Regression Tests - Security & Refactoring
action.body:
## Overview
Comprehensive regression testing after security fixes and refactoring.

## Dependencies
- Auth Fix: #${$.auth_module_fix.output.number}
- Logging: #${$.logging_improvement.output.number}
- Error Handling: #${$.error_handling_improvement.output.number}

## Priority
**P1 - High**

## Test Coverage
- [ ] Security regression tests
- [ ] Functional regression tests
- [ ] Performance regression tests
- [ ] Integration tests
